name: Aarohi Chatterjee
title: Data Analyst
summary: Software / data professional with 7.7 years of experience building data pipelines, backend systems, and analytics infrastructure. Most of my work has been data pipelines and analytics infrastructure; I've shipped a couple of small ML features but it's not the core of my day. My toolkit is solid on the data engineering side — Python, SQL, Spark, Airflow, warehouse design — and I've completed a couple of self-directed ML projects (Kaggle competitions, side projects fine-tuning small models). Interested in transitioning toward more AI/ML-focused work, ideally at a company where I can leverage my existing data-infra skills while learning modern ML practice.

explainability.why_selected: 7.7 years experience in Data Analyst with Weaviate, Angular, and Computer Vision. Strong recruiter responsiveness (80%), minor concern: 30-day notice.
explainability.recruiter_notes: Candidate has 7.7 years of experience and 8 skills. Notice period: 30 days. Expected salary: 15.1 LPA. Priority level: Medium.
